l1.content:
{
  "edit_description": "Add .gitignore entries for *.egg-info and __pycache__ to prevent build artifacts from being tracked.",
  "target_files": [".gitignore"],
  "patch_commands": [
    "echo '.egg-info' >> .gitignore",
    "echo '__pycache__' >> .gitignore"
  ],
  "validation_commands": [
    "grep -q 'egg-info' .gitignore",
    "grep -q 'pycache' .gitignore"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "Build artifacts (*.egg-info, __pycache__) are no longer tracked in .gitignore.",
  "risk_notes": "Potential security risk if these files are accidentally committed to version control.",
  "follow_up_type": "none|needs_review"
}

parsed.edit_description: Add .gitignore entries for *.egg-info and __pycache__ to prevent build artifacts from being tracked.
parsed.expected_outcome: Build artifacts (*.egg-info, __pycache__) are no longer tracked in .gitignore.
parsed.risk_notes: Potential security risk if these files are accidentally committed to version control.
